title: macrochiton excelsum
intro: Macrochiton excelsum, also known as the "Cockspur Coral Tree," is a tropical plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Macrochiton excelsum include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Macrochiton excelsum include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be made by boiling the plant's bark, leaves, or roots in water.
